NpcGenerator.Title: NPC Quick Generator
NpcGenerator.LevelHint: The level (and CR) for the generated NPC. Stats scale based on this value.
NpcGenerator.TemplateHint: Select a built-in archetype, a compendium template, or enter custom values.
NpcGenerator.OverrideHint: Optionally override the formula-derived values with fixed resolve or power maximums.
NpcGenerator.NpcNameHint: Leave blank to use the template name or a default name.
NpcGenerator.NoTemplatesAvailable: No compendium templates available — using built-in archetypes.
NpcGenerator.MustBeNpc: The selected actor must be an NPC.
NpcGenerator.CustomHint: Manually assign ability scores. The total must equal the stat budget.
NpcGenerator.GenerationFailed: Failed to generate NPC. Check the console for details.
NpcGenerator.CalloutCreate: Configure the NPC's stats below and click Generate to create a new NPC actor.
NpcGenerator.CalloutApply: Applying stats to "{name}". This will update the NPC's abilities, level, and derived stats.
